overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city. The journey begins on a sunlit modern sidewalk, transitions through an industrial highway underpass with heavy traffic, and approaches a vibrant neon-lit downtown district before entering a dark parking structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern city sidewalk with commercial buildings

events.description: entering covered area beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and approaching the highway underpass

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking in same direction ahead of camera
yellow futuristic sports car parked along the curb

entered.detail: tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade
green street sign with white text reading 'Cannock' mounted on pole
sleek yellow sports car with futuristic design parked on street
large concrete and steel overpass with pedestrian walkway and billboards
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying commercial content

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit modern city sidewalk with glass buildings on the left. The camera passes a pedestrian in an orange jacket and approaches a highway overpass with digital billboards visible ahead. A yellow futuristic sports car is parked along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway underpass with power infrastructure

events.description: transitioning from bright sunlight into shadow beneath the highway deck
orange industrial truck passes by emitting exhaust fumes

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass alongside moving traffic

notable_agents.action: orange industrial truck driving along the road emitting smoke

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Pinewood'
utilitarian concrete industrial structures with minimal windows
tall electrical pylons with multiple power lines stretching across the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving into the shadow of the highway overpass, the environment shifts to an industrial character with power lines visible in the distance. The 'Pinewood' street sign appears as vehicles including an orange truck pass by on the road. The modern buildings of the previous area are now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep highway underpass with heavy traffic flow

events.description: environment becomes significantly darker with artificial fluorescent lighting dominating
dense stream of futuristic vehicles passing in both directions

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow shoulder between the guardrail and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving past closely on the right side
red sedan merging into the traffic flow

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the highway above
steel safety barrier separating pedestrian path from traffic
linear artificial lights mounted on the underside of the highway deck

segments.scene_description: Deep within the highway underpass, the scene is dominated by concrete pillars and artificial lighting. Heavy futuristic traffic flows past on the right while the camera walks along the guardrail. The environment is enclosed and industrial with fluorescent lights illuminating the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown district with neon advertising

events.description: bright colorful neon signs and digital billboards become visible ahead
turning right and entering dark parking garage or tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the neon-lit city center then turning to enter a dark garage entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens with vibrant pink and blue neon colors
futuristic high-rise buildings with elaborate neon signage and holographic displays
large dark opening leading to underground parking or tunnel with concrete walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the deep underpass, the view opens to reveal a vibrant cyberpunk cityscape with massive neon billboards and futuristic skyscrapers glowing in the distance. The camera continues forward before turning right into a dark parking garage entrance, leaving the highway structure behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, modern city sidewalk into the industrial depths of a highway underpass and finally toward a neon-lit urban core. It begins on a sunlit path lined with glass buildings, passing a pedestrian in an orange jacket and a parked yellow sports car before approaching a highway overpass. As the camera moves into the shadow of the overpass, the environment shifts to an industrial character marked by power lines and a Pinewood street sign. The scene then descends deeper into the enclosed underpass, where concrete pillars and fluorescent lights dominate the view while heavy futuristic traffic flows along the guardrail. Finally, the camera exits the structure as the view opens to reveal a vibrant cityscape of glowing skyscrapers and massive neon billboards before turning right into the darkness of a parking garage.
